zh.lifeSummary: 當Jutta van Cuijk於大約1126年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特可時，她的父親Godfried I van Cuijk27歲，母親Ida von Arnsberg19歲。她和Hermann II von Virneburg至少有2個兒子。她去世於大約1162年享年38歲。

zh-hans.Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhin: 德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯阿斯格

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jutta van Cuijk于大约1126年出生在荷兰努-布拉班特可时，她的父亲Godfried I van Cuijk27岁，母亲Ida von Arnsberg19岁。她和Hermann II von Virneburg至少有2个儿子。她去世于大约1162年享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Jutta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Judith  , also used as an independent given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Jutta van Cuijk was born about 1126, in Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands, her father, Godfried I van Cuijk, was 27 and her mother, Ida von Arnsberg, was 19. She had at least 2 sons with Hermann II von Virneburg. She died about 1162, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jutta van Cuijk est née environ 1126, à Cuijk, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Godfried I van Cuijk, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ida von Arnsberg, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Hermann II von Virneburg. Elle est décédée environ 1162, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jutta van Cuijk um 1126 in Cuijk, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godfried I van Cuijk 27 und ihre Mutter Ida von Arnsberg 19. Sie hatte mit Hermann II von Virneburg mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb um 1162 im Alter von 38 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jutta van Cuijk è nata il circa 1126 nel Cuijk, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Godfried I van Cuijk, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Ida von Arnsberg, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Hermann II von Virneburg. Morì circa 1162, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.Of Virneburg, Rhnlnd, Prss: ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス メイエン-コブレンズバーネブルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Jutta van Cuijkが約1126年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントクウイジクで生まれた時，父Godfried I van Cuijkは27歳，母Ida von Arnsbergは19歳であった。彼女はHermann II von Virneburgとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は約1162年に38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jutta van Cuijk(이)가 대략 1126년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 c이j크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godfried I van Cuijk(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ida von Arnsberg(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Hermann II von Virneburg(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1162년 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1126–about 1162: tany ho any amin'ny 1126–tany ho any amin'ny 1162

pt.Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands: Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jutta van Cuijk nasceu aproximadamente 1126, em Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Godfried I van Cuijk, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ida von Arnsberg, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Hermann II von Virneburg. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1162, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jutta van Cuijk родилась около 1126 г. в местности куиджк, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Godfried I van Cuijk было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida von Arnsberg, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Hermann II von Virneburg. Она умерла около 1162 г. в возрасте 38 лет.

sm.about 1126–about 1162: e tusa o le 1126–e tusa o le 1162

es.Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands: Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jutta van Cuijk nació aproximadamente 1126, en Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, su papá, Godfried I van Cuijk, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Ida von Arnsberg, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Hermann II von Virneburg. Murió aproximadamente 1162, a la edad de 38 años.
